message:
Investigate native binding visibility issue in bytecode execution

Changes:
- Use JS_DefinePropertyValueStr with CONFIGURABLE|WRITABLE|ENUMERABLE flags
  for better property visibility
- Re-register bindings after bytecode load (before execution)
- Add test function nativeTestFunc for debugging
- Clean up debug print statements from polyfills
- Remove timer debug output to reduce noise

Status: --version works, -p hello fails due to missing fs implementation.
The core issue is that native functions registered via registerGlobalFunction
are NOT visible to pre-compiled bytecode, even though print() (registered by
js_std_add_helpers) works. This requires further investigation into QuickJS
bytecode scoping.

Pending: Figure out why globalThis properties set before JS_EvalFunction
are not visible to the executed bytecode.
